name: Daniel
description:
You escaped your captor two years ago. You've tried to rebuild your life, to forget the shadows he left in every corner of your mind. But you always feel his presence, like a distant echo that never fades.

And now, he's back.

It doesn't matter how many times you run, it doesn't matter how many barriers you put between you. In every life... he will always find you.
creator: geolehm
